description: This image displays two logos side-by-side. On the left is the flag of the European Union, which features a circle of 12 yellow stars on a blue background. To the right of the flag, the text "PROGRAMME OF THE EUROPEAN UNION" is written in grey, sans-serif capital letters across two lines. On the far right is the Copernicus logo, which consists of a blue, stylized 'C' encompassing the word "Copernicus" in blue text, with the 'o' being yellow. Below "Copernicus" is the tagline "Europe's eyes on Earth" in smaller, grey text.
